name: Token Value Over Time
summary: Measures wallet holdings of selected tokens, with more weight for longer-held amounts. Each lot gains value over time until it reaches full value after the configured holding period.
description:
### What this algorithm is
This algorithm measures a wallet's token holdings for selected chain/token pairs, giving more credit to tokens held longer.

Each incoming transfer creates a separate lot. A new lot starts at zero value and gains value over time until it reaches full value after the maturation threshold.

### How value is calculated
- Each lot's age is measured in days.
- Lot value grows linearly from 0 to 100% over the maturation threshold.
- Once a lot reaches the threshold, it counts at full value.

The final wallet score is the sum of all remaining lot values across all selected tokens.

### Multiple transfers
- Every incoming transfer is a separate lot.
- Outgoing transfers consume the oldest lots first (FIFO).
- The algorithm evaluates remaining lots at the snapshot run time.

### What data is used
Upload one JSON file that provides the wallet addresses to score.

Example:
```json
{
  "wallets": {
    "ethereum": ["0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678"],
    "cardano": ["addr1q9exampleexampleexampleexampleexampleexample"]
  }
}
```

The algorithm reads indexed token transfer history from the database for the uploaded wallets only.

### Outputs
- A per-wallet CSV with wallet_address and token_value.
- A JSON details file with per-token and per-lot calculations.

inputs.label: Wallet Addresses JSON
inputs.description: Upload one JSON file with a wallets object containing ethereum and/or cardano wallet address arrays.

inputs.label: Maturation Threshold (Days)
inputs.description: Number of days a token lot must be held before it reaches full value.

inputs.label: Assets to Include
inputs.description: Select one or more supported tokens to include in the score. Holdings across all selected assets are combined into one wallet score.

properties.label: Token
properties.description: Aset identifier on the selected chain.

outputs.label: Token Value Over Time by Wallet Address
outputs.description: Per-wallet CSV with columns: wallet_address, token_value (numeric score).

outputs.label: Token Value Over Time Details (JSON)
outputs.description: Full per-wallet breakdown including per-token and per-lot calculations. For debugging and auditing.
